primary_pain: Manual patient booking process creates friction and likely costs the practice new patient appointments
secondary_pains: No online scheduling visible on website
Contact page relies entirely on phone calls during business hours

evidence.snippet: Contact page shows only a phone number and physical address with no online booking or contact form
Team page lists 12 staff members including 3 dentists, suggesting a growing practice

business_impact: Potential patients who prefer online booking are likely choosing competitors. Phone-only intake creates a bottleneck during peak hours and limits after-hours appointment requests.
recommended_service_angle: Implement a streamlined online booking system that captures after-hours appointment requests and reduces front-desk phone volume by 40%
company_summary: Mid-size dental practice offering general, cosmetic, and orthodontic services across two locations with a team of 12 staff.

observed_signals.signal: No online booking form on contact page

likely_pains.pain: Lost appointments from patients who prefer online booking
evidence_refs: No online booking form on contact page

likely_pains.pain: Staff scheduling complexity increasing with growth

best_outreach_angle: Highlight how a simple online booking setup could capture the after-hours appointment requests they are currently missing, with a quick audit of their current booking flow as proof of value.
caution_do_not_claim: Do not claim they are losing a specific number or percentage of patients
Do not claim their staff is overwhelmed — this is speculative
Do not claim knowledge of their revenue or patient volume
